User.title: User Profile
User.description: User profile document containing display details.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp or server timestamp when the account was registered

lastLoginAt.description: ISO timestamp or server timestamp during the last authenticated login

GameSession.title: Game Session
GameSession.description: Information about a completed trivia session.

uid.description: Foreign key to users collection document

displayName.description: Name at the time of play

topicStats.description: Breakdown of scores aggregated by learning topic

answers.description: Detailed log of user actions on each question

Leaderboard.title: Leaderboard Record
Leaderboard.description: Public records of outstanding user achievements for aggregate scoreboard display.

totalGames.description: Number of games completed that contributed to leaderboard

lastPlayedAt.description: Timestamp of the last game session

users/{userId}.description: User profiles indexed by their Auth UID.

gameSessions/{sessionId}.description: Logged historic sessions played by authenticated users.

leaderboard/{userId}.description: Rank records indexed by UID to track progress and ranks.
